chosen_action.title: Stop cross-window reuse of stale distribution-architecture guard artifacts

summary: Patched the marketing loop and outcome execution-board runner so guard_follow_through/guard_pause artifacts only reuse inside the current short review window instead of suppressing fresh same-window follow-through with stale older logs.

why_this_action.summary: The execution board was empty after the short-window release, but outcome_execution_board_runner still reused a 2026-05-25 guard-follow-through artifact for the same fingerprint. That created fake progress and blocked a truthful same-window repair slot.
shared_findings_used: marketing_execution_board_latest.md: no truthful do-now packet exists in the current review window
distribution_lane_latest.json: current lane escalated to distribution_architecture_repair because same-window guard follow-through was missing
outcome_execution_board_latest.json: the runner had just reused a prior-day guard-follow-through artifact for the same fingerprint
marketing_workflow_audit_latest.json: Codeberg remains flat, so process truth matters more than packet churn
reddit_post_analysis_latest.json: Reddit already shipped; do not burn this slot repeating that lane

result.observed_outcome: After the patch, outcome_execution_board_runner stopped reusing the prior-day guard-follow-through artifact and selected distribution_architecture_repair / distribution_architecture_churn_guard_repair for the current fingerprint instead.
